prompt:
Hi! You should not care that much about this. Everyone got same time a day and most people study good with it.
To get more free time you should organise your whole week. Write down all your deadlines to be done and all homeworks you want to start. Allocate time for tasks per day, and you'll see how fast you're getting everyday tasks done.

Also Its important to understand what you actually need to do. If subject seems not intresting and its not needed in next courses and for your life, why do you need to do all the tasks and get exhausted every day to get max grade?

To sum up, you have to organise your days, set priorities. And keep in mind, that no one said it would be easy to learn here!

messages.content:
You are an expert CEFR writing assessor.
Assess the student text using the provided task/context blocks as supporting evidence.
Use EXPERT_ANNOTATION, CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES, RETRIEVED_ERROR_SPANS, and RANKING_ANCHORS only as supporting context; never override direct evidence from the student text.
Return ONLY one CEFR label from: A1|A2|B1|B2|C1|C2.
Do not output JSON.
Do not output explanation.

TASK: You read this post in the Telegram chat of first year students: It is so difficult to study in university! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.
STUDENT_TEXT: Hi! You should not care that much about this. Everyone got same time a day and most people study good with it.
To get more free time you should organise your whole week. Write down all your deadlines to be done and all homeworks you want to start. Allocate time for tasks per day, and you'll see how fast you're getting everyday tasks done.

Also Its important to understand what you actually need to do. If subject seems not intresting and its not needed in next courses and for your life, why do you need to do all the tasks and get exhausted every day to get max grade?

To sum up, you have to organise your days, set priorities. And keep in mind, that no one said it would be easy to learn here!
TEXT_TYPE: essay
CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES: [{"ref_id":"sample_07010","cefr_level":"B1","task":"You read this post in the Telegram chat of first year students: It is so difficult to study in university! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.","student_text":"Hey there! I've already finished the first semester, so I can help you. Here are some tips to have more free time:

	* Do tasks when they published, not at the last day. For example you thought that the homework will take one day, and after some time you realize that it is harder and you need to spend more time on it. But because you started earlier you have a lot of days before deadline, so you can do this homework easily.
	* Make plan and stick to it. You should know when you need to do certain homework, so you won't spend time on choosing task.
	* Don't forget to chill sometimes. You need to have at least one hour free time per day.
	* Sleep 7+ hours. If you think, that you can get more time by sleeping less -- you are wrong. You'll be exhausted the whole next day.

By following these tips I was able to pass all exams on score 8 or higher out of 10. Also, I had 1-2 hours free time each day and was able to participate in some olympiads/hackathons each weekends.","expert_annotation":{"annotator_id":8,"errors":[{"text":"they published,","labels":["Grammar"],"start":133,"end":148},{"text":"at the last day.","labels":["Grammar"],"start":153,"end":169},{"text":"For example you","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":170,"end":185},{"text":"will","labels":["Grammar"],"start":212,"end":216},{"text":"realize","labels":["Grammar"],"start":255,"end":262},{"text":"is ","labels":["Grammar"],"start":271,"end":274},{"text":"need","labels":["Grammar"],"start":289,"end":293},{"text":"earlier you","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":344,"end":355},{"text":"because","labels":["Lexical choice"],"start":324,"end":331},{"text":"deadline","labels":["Grammar"],"start":382,"end":390},{"text":"plan","labels":["Grammar"],"start":436,"end":440},{"text":"homework, so","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":502,"end":514},{"text":"task","labels":["Grammar"],"start":548,"end":552},{"text":" think, that","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":669,"end":681},{"text":"-- you","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":721,"end":727},{"text":"tips I ","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":799,"end":806},{"text":"on score ","labels":["Grammar"],"start":833,"end":842},{"text":"hours free","labels":["Grammar"],"start":881,"end":891},{"text":"weekends","labels":["Grammar"],"start":968,"end":976}],"strengths":[{"text":"For example ","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":170,"end":182},{"text":"Also","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":865,"end":869},{"text":"You should know ","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":458,"end":474},{"text":"stick to it","labels":["Lexical choice ✓"],"start":445,"end":456}],"comments":[["since"]]}},{"ref_id":"sample_07018","cefr_level":"B2","task":"You read this post in the Telegram chat of first year students: It is so difficult to study in university! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.","student_text":"HI! I had (and sometimes have) this feeling too. I think, that we have it because we can't organize the studying process properly. So, I've got some tips for you.

	* Firstly, create a TODO list. Write down tasks that you have to do. It's much easier to understand what you can do next with the list like this. Also you can mark completed tasks. But the key tip for TODO list is not to write very big tasks, but to split them into the smaller ones. 
	* Have a BREAK. You can't concentrate on the task for a long time, your mind needs time to relax.

If you stick to this tips, you would't think all the time "I need so much to do", because you will be more productive and satisfied with the list of completed tasks. Good luck!","expert_annotation":{"annotator_id":6,"errors":[{"text":"I think,","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":49,"end":57},{"text":"TODO","labels":["Spelling","Punctuation"],"start":185,"end":189},{"text":"the list","labels":["Grammar"],"start":291,"end":299},{"text":"Also","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":311,"end":315},{"text":"TODO list","labels":["Grammar","Spelling","Punctuation"],"start":366,"end":375},{"text":"the smaller ones","labels":["Grammar"],"start":431,"end":447},{"text":"this tips","labels":["Grammar"],"start":566,"end":575},{"text":"would't","labels":["Spelling"],"start":581,"end":588}],"strengths":[{"text":"I think,","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":49,"end":57},{"text":"Firstly","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":167,"end":174},{"text":"Firstly","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":167,"end":174},{"text":"Also","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":311,"end":315},{"text":"can do next","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":274,"end":285},{"text":"you can mark completed tasks","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":316,"end":344},{"text":"But the key tip","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":346,"end":361},{"text":"would't","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":581,"end":588},{"text":"You can't concentrate on","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":467,"end":491},{"text":" you stick ","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":552,"end":563},{"text":" you would't think all the time "I need so much to do", because you will be more productive and satisfied with the list of completed tasks. Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.","student_text":"Hi, im styduing in the MIPT - in one of the hardest technical universitiyes in Russia, and i want to give you some advices.

My first advidce - it to sleep from 7 to 9 hours (how much exactly depends from you) in day, and you should stand from up and go to bed in one time in day. With sleeping regulary in one time you will feel better and maybe you will feel better.

Next advice - it to make calendar with notions, or something like this, it helps to plan day wery succesfull. Sometimes procrastination wins you, but with notions it weel be easier to make hometasks in time.

The third advice - food delivery, if you have not enought time to cook something, or to go somewhere in big sity you can easily get food from delivery services. But sometimes people eats only food from delivery, and even don't go out from their rooms, of course it isn't good.

And the last what i want to say - probably your biggest troubles with time it that you have not hard character. Without this super ability it hard to self-controle, may be you should to ask your friends wathching what are you doing in free time, they can anounce if you spend time on games or other time-killers.

I believe that my advices can help to had more free time, good bye.","expert_annotation":{"annotator_id":5,"errors":[{"text":"im","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":4,"end":6},{"text":"styduing","labels":["Spelling"],"start":7,"end":15},{"text":"in the MIPT","labels":["Grammar"],"start":16,"end":27},{"text":" in","labels":["Grammar"],"start":29,"end":32},{"text":"i","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":91,"end":92},{"text":"some advices","labels":["Grammar"],"start":110,"end":122},{"text":"advidce","labels":["Grammar"],"start":134,"end":141},{"text":"advidce","labels":["Spelling"],"start":134,"end":141},{"text":"it to sleep","labels":["Grammar","Spelling"],"start":144,"end":155},{"text":"depends from","labels":["Grammar","Spelling"],"start":192,"end":204},{"text":"in day","labels":["Grammar"],"start":210,"end":216},{"text":"stand from up","labels":["Grammar"],"start":233,"end":246},{"text":"","labels":["Grammar","Lexical choice"],"start":261,"end":261},{"text":" in day.
